name: io.github.dgenio/contextweaver
title: contextweaver
description: MCP gateway: bounded tool shortlists + artifact-backed result firewall. Deterministic, no model.

packageArguments.name: --config
packageArguments.description: Path to a gateway config (YAML/JSON) declaring the upstream tool catalog and serve options (mode, top_k, beam_width). See the gateway quickstart at https://dgenio.github.io/contextweaver/recipes/.
